title: Australian Brown Rice Pilaf
description: A simple and flavorful brown rice pilaf, inspired by Australian cuisine. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the brown rice and pilaf spice blend. Cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the water and salt. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the cooked rice with a fork and season with pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
